title: Pod Events Logging Fix
body:
on create, libpod was only creating a new event if the pod had an infra container.
now, pod creation triggers a new pod event with or without infra.

Signed-off-by: cdoern <cbdoer23@g.holycross.edu>

comments.body: @containers/podman-maintainers PTAL, This slipped by when redesigning infra. Glad we could catch it now.
